settings.sidebar.title: Settings
settings.clients.title: Clients
settings.clients.intro: Defaults for invoices: due dates, payment terms, and numbering.
settings.clients.emailTemplatesHint: Invoice email wording and the due-date reminder automation are configured under Settings → Messages.
settings.user.title: User Settings
settings.user.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.
settings.user.languageHelp: Choose the language for your own interface.
settings.business.title: Business Settings
settings.business.subtitle: Manage your company information.
settings.business.timezoneHelp: Used for automated emails and “start of day” scheduling. Defaults from your country; change if your business operates in a different zone.
settings.business.routes.title: Start & end locations for routes
settings.business.routes.help: When on, employees can set a start and end address (e.g. home). Routes in the planner will begin and end at those locations.
settings.business.routes.defaultHelp: Default addresses used when an employee has not set their own.
settings.business.routes.endPlaceholder: Leave empty to use start address
settings.business.slug.title: Company URL
settings.business.slug.help: This is the URL slug for your workspace. It is independent of your company name - you can rename your company without changing it.
settings.business.slug.validation: Use only letters, numbers and dashes (min 2 characters)
settings.business.slug.confirmBody: Changing your company URL will break all existing bookmarks and shared links. There is no redirect - the old URL simply stops working. Make sure to update any links you have shared.
settings.business.slug.invalidInput: Please enter a valid URL slug (letters, numbers and dashes only, min 2 characters).
settings.business.slug.alreadyCurrent: That is already your current URL
settings.business.slug.takenChooseAnothe: That URL is already taken. Choose another.

app.clients.add.subtitle: Create a new client that you can schedule jobs and send invoices to.
app.clients.add.separateBillingAddressHe: Use this when the legal/billing address on the invoice should be different from the service address.
app.clients.add.separateBillingContactHe: Use this when invoices and payment reminders should go to a different email/phone than the main client.

app.subscription.subtitleNew: Set up a recurring job schedule
app.subscription.notePlaceholder: Add a note for this subscription…
app.subscription.errClientRequired: Please select or add a client
app.subscription.errServiceRequired: Please add at least one service
app.subscription.errStartingDateRequired: Please set a starting date in the Schedule tab
app.subscription.errInvalidClient: Error: invalid client. Please select or create a valid client.
app.subscription.setTimeDesc: Set the scheduled time for this subscription
app.subscription.addNoteDesc: Add a note to this subscription
app.subscription.schedule.startingDateHe: Jobs are generated from this date onward based on the schedule below.
app.subscription.schedule.dayOfMonthHelp: Days 29–31 are clamped to the last day of shorter months.
app.subscription.schedule.customMonthsPl: Custom — type any number of months
app.subscription.forecast.priceChangeBod: From {{from}} → {{to}} per visit. All future jobs will reflect the new price. Past completed jobs are unchanged.
app.subscription.forecast.dividerToday: Today – changes take effect from here
app.subscription.forecast.emptyHint: Set a starting date in the Schedule tab to see the forecast

app.team.subtitle: Manage your team members and their roles
app.team.errNetworkFetch: Network error: Failed to fetch team members
app.team.errNetworkInvite: Network error: Failed to send invitation
app.team.errResendNetwork: Failed to resend invitation. Please try again.
app.team.errRemoveInviteNetwork: Failed to remove invitation. Please try again.
app.team.confirmRemoveUser: Remove {{name}} from this company? Their account will remain active.
app.team.errRemoveUserNetwork: Failed to remove user. Please try again.
app.team.sectionManagementDesc: Owners and managers with administrative access
app.team.emptyManagersDesc: Managers and owners will appear here
app.leaveModal.subtitle: Record leave, sick days, or absences
app.teamMember.workHoursHelp: Weekly working hours used for capacity planning
app.workHours.title: Work hours
app.workHours.subtitle: Planning template used to calculate daily capacity
app.workHours.fixedHint: Fixed schedule: employee starts and ends at the same time each weekday. Good for route planning.
app.workHours.flexibleHint: Flexible schedule: employee has a daily hour budget without fixed clock times. Good for contractors.
settings.workHours.title: Default work hours
settings.workHours.subtitle: These hours are applied to new employees when they join. Existing employees keep their own schedule.
app.appointments.upcomingSubtitle: Appointments, time off and leave. Add them from the jobs page.
app.appointments.addFromJobs: Open the jobs page and use + to add one.
app.appointments.label: appointments
app.appointments.kindWorkHelp: Counted as productive work time (meeting, errand, training). Blocks capacity the same way.
app.appointments.kindTimeOffHelp: Counted as time off (sick, vacation). Blocks capacity, and separated in reports.
app.appointments.adminSubtitle: Blocks capacity for the selected employee on the chosen day.
app.appointments.employeeSubtitle: Your request will be sent to an admin for approval.
app.appointments.title: Title
app.appointments.hoursHelp: Use when you don't need a specific clock time — just a count that's deducted from the day.
app.appointments.allDayHelp: Blocks the full work day — no jobs can be scheduled against that day's capacity.
app.appointments.employeeRequestHelp: This appointment will be sent as a request. An admin must approve it before it blocks capacity.
app.appointments.errors.titleRequired: Please give the appointment a title.
app.appointments.errors.spanMissing: Start and end time are required.
app.appointments.errors.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time.
invoice.new.clientPickerHelp: Pick a client to start. You'll then choose which completed jobs to include and finish the details.
invoice.new.searchClientPlaceholder: Search by name, email or phone…
invoice.new.noClientsTitle: You don't have any clients yet.
invoice.new.noClientsHelp: Add a client first, then come back here to invoice them.
invoice.new.numberingTitle: Choose your invoice number start first
invoice.new.numberingHelp: We won't create an invoice until you've told us where the numbering should begin. This avoids invoices accidentally starting at #1 when your previous system was already further along.
invoice.new.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description shown on the invoice above the line items...
invoice.new.noInvoiceableJobs: No completed, un-invoiced jobs for this client.
invoice.new.noInvoiceableJobsHelp: Mark a job as completed first, or pick another client.
invoice.new.noJobsAddedYet: No jobs added yet. Use the dropdown above to add completed jobs to this invoice.
invoice.new.noStandardTermsTitle: No standard payment terms saved yet.
invoice.new.noStandardTermsHelp: Save a template once and it will be filled in automatically every time you create an invoice.
invoice.new.paymentTermsPlaceholder: Type one-off terms here, or set a reusable template under Invoice options.
invoice.new.paymentOptionsHelp: These show up on the invoice you send. Turn one off here if you don't want to offer it for this specific invoice.
invoice.new.noPaymentOptionsHelp: Activate at least one (e.g. bank transfer) so clients know how to pay you. You can't create an invoice without one.
invoice.new.allMethodsOffWarn: You've turned off every payment option. Turn at least one back on, or this invoice has no way for the client to pay.
invoice.new.gateNumberingNotSet: Set your invoice number start before creating the invoice.
invoice.new.gateNoMethods: Activate a payment option to enable invoice creation.
invoice.new.gateAllMethodsOff: Turn at least one payment option on for this invoice.
invoice.new.gateNoJobs: Pick at least one job to enable invoice creation.
invoice.new.previewEmpty: Select jobs to see them here.
invoice.new.picker.noJobs: No completed jobs for this client yet
invoice.new.picker.allAdded: All completed jobs added to this invoice
invoice.new.picker.search: Search and add a completed job…
app.messages.pageSubtitle: Manage automated messages and manual send templates in one place.
app.messages.saveError: Could not save messages right now.
app.messages.repliesToHelp: Customer replies from email notifications will be routed to this address. Default is company owner email.
app.messages.personalizationTagsHelp: Use these tags in subject lines and message bodies. They will be replaced with real values when sending.
app.messages.modal.automationHelp: When off, nothing is sent for this automation.
app.messages.modal.subject: Subject
app.messages.modal.openingMessageHelpA: Shown under the greeting, before date and location. Tags like
app.messages.modal.help.jobCreated: Sends after this many minutes. Uses the latest job data at send-time; skipped if the job is cancelled.
app.messages.modal.help.jobReminder: Hours before midnight (00:00) of the job day. Skipped if that time has already passed when the job is created. Decimals allowed (e.g. 2.5 → 21:30).
app.messages.modal.help.invoiceDue: Hours before midnight (00:00) of the invoice due date. Only for sent invoices that are still unpaid. Decimals allowed.
app.messages.tpl.email_job_created.title: Job created confirmation
app.messages.tpl.email_job_created.descr: Automated email sent shortly after a job is created.
app.messages.tpl.email_invoice_send.desc: Default subject and message when you send an invoice to a client (e-invoice link).
app.messages.tpl.email_invoice_due_remin: Automatically reminds the client before the due date if the invoice is still unpaid.
app.messages.tpl.email_date_changed.desc: Manual template used when date is changed and you choose to send.
app.messages.tpl.email_job_cancelled.des: Manual template used when cancellation notice is sent.
app.messages.tpl.email_time_updated.desc: Manual template used when time changes and you choose to send.
Manual template used when the assigned employee is changed and you choose to notify.
app.messages.tpl.sms_on_the_way.title: Employee is on the way
app.messages.tpl.sms_on_the_way.descript: Automated SMS when technician starts driving to client.
app.messages.tpl.sms_day_before.title: Day-before reminder
app.messages.tpl.sms_day_before.descript: Automated reminder sent before arrival day.
app.messages.auto.email_job_created.titl: Email confirmation after job is created
app.messages.auto.email_job_created.desc: Send a confirmation email automatically after creating a job.
app.messages.auto.email_job_reminder.des: Send reminder email automatically before the visit.
app.messages.auto.email_invoice_due_remi: Send an email automatically before the invoice due date if it is still unpaid.
app.messages.auto.sms_day_before.title: SMS reminder before job
app.messages.auto.sms_on_the_way.title: SMS when employee is on the way
app.messages.auto.sms_on_the_way.descrip: Send SMS automatically when route status changes to on-the-way.
app.teamMember.routeLocationsHelp: Start and end point for daily routes
app.teamMember.routeDisabledHelp: Your company has turned off this feature. An admin can enable it in Settings -> Business.
app.teamMember.noCompanyDefault: No company default set - configure in Business Settings
app.teamMember.leaveEmptyUseStart: Leave empty to use start location
app.teamMember.endLocationHelp: If end location is empty, the route ends at the start location.
app.teamMember.timeOffSubtitle: Manage holidays, sick days, and absences
app.teamMember.noLeave: No leave recorded. Click any day on the calendar to add.

app.clientsList.subtitle: {{count}} client total

app.clientsList.errNetwork: Network error: Failed to fetch clients
app.clientDetail.anonymizedHint: Personal data has been removed. History is preserved.
app.clientDetail.dangerZoneBody: Removes all personal data and every encrypted client note from this profile. Jobs, subscriptions, and analytics stay linked; issued invoices keep their own snapshot and are not changed.
app.clientDetail.removeDataModalSubtitle: You are about to permanently delete everything stored for {{name}} on this client profile. This cannot be undone.
app.clientDetail.removeDataModalBulletPi: Contact details, addresses, billing fields, company and EAN numbers, and map coordinates
app.clientDetail.removeDataModalBulletNo: All encrypted standard notes for this client
app.clientDetail.removeDataModalKept: Jobs and subscriptions remain (the profile will show as "Deleted client"). Issued invoices are unchanged — they keep their own copy of customer details and line items.
app.clientDetail.jobsSubtitle: Jobs will appear here when created
app.clientDetail.subscriptionsHint: Create recurring jobs with a subscription
app.clientDetail.confirmDelete:
Remove personal data for {{name}}?

Name, address, phone, email, billing details, and all encrypted client notes will be permanently removed. The profile stays as "Deleted client" so jobs and subscriptions remain. Issued invoices keep their snapshot and are not changed. This cannot be undone.
app.jobsPage.errorHint: If this says "No active company selected", log out and log back in (or go to /select-company).
app.jobsPage.moveJobDescription: Move this job to a new date?

app.createJob.setTimeDesc: Set the scheduled time for this job
app.createJob.addNoteDesc: Add a note to this job
app.createJob.notePlaceholder: Enter a note for this job...
app.createJob.noJobsThisDate: No jobs scheduled for this date
app.createJob.subtitle: Schedule a one-time job
app.jobView.moveJobSubtitle: You are about to move this job to a new date
app.jobView.lockedDesc: This job is part of an invoice and cannot be changed here.
app.jobView.selectAddressHint: Select an address from the suggestions to confirm location
app.jobView.automationBookingDesc: A booking confirmation email will be sent to the client automatically.
app.jobView.automationReminderDesc: A day reminder email will be sent to the client automatically.
app.routePlanner.title: Route Planner
app.routePlanner.drawRouteHint: Click stops in the order you want to visit them.
app.routePlanner.selectEmployeePlan: Select an employee to plan their route
invoice.howToPayIntro: You can pay using the options below. Please include the payment reference so we can match your payment to this invoice.
invoice.bankTransferDesc: Pay directly from your bank using the details below.
invoice.poweredBySub: Powered by a secure link. Do not share if you are not the intended recipient.
invoice.previewBannerBody: This is how the client will see the digital invoice. A public link is only available after you send the invoice.
invoice.previewFooter: This is a staff preview. Clients only get a shareable link after the invoice is sent.
invoice.previewSubFooter: Preview only — not shared with the client.
invoice.adminFooter: Internal view — matches what clients see on the digital invoice (except payment methods may differ until Extensions are configured).
invoice.noPaymentOptionsBody: Clients will not see how to pay until you enable at least one payment method (for example bank transfer) under Extensions.
invoice.new.title: New invoice
invoice.new.subtitle: Select a client to get started.
invoice.new.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description shown on the invoice above the line items...
invoice.new.noCompletedJobs: No completed jobs for this client.
invoice.new.noMoreJobs: All completed jobs are already on this invoice.
invoice.new.discountHelper: Enter a positive amount to subtract from this line.
invoice.new.paymentTermsMissing: No payment terms set up yet.
invoice.new.paymentOptionsHelp: Toggle which active payment methods appear on this invoice.
invoice.new.numberingNotSet: Set the first invoice number in Invoice options before creating invoices.
invoice.detail.previewUnavailable: Could not load the digital invoice preview. Try refreshing the page.
invoice.detail.noTransactions: No payments or extra charges yet.
invoice.detail.previewHint: Staff-only preview (same as the client view). No public link until the invoice is sent.
invoice.detail.onlineHint: Opens the secure page your client can use to view this invoice and pay with your enabled methods.
invoice.detail.enablePaymentMethodWarn: Enable at least one payment method in Extensions before sending.
invoice.detail.sendNotificationDesc: Email the client a reminder right now. The scheduled automatic reminder still runs as planned.
invoice.detail.manageReminder: Manage wording and timing in Settings → Messages. Cancel here if you do not want this email.
invoice.detail.autoReminderInfo: Due-date reminders run automatically when enabled under
invoice.detail.noReminderScheduled: . Nothing is scheduled for this invoice (already paid, past due time, or automation off).
invoice.detail.sendDescription: Sends an email with a button to open the e-invoice (no PDF). Subject and message come from your First invoice email template in Settings → Messages (placeholders filled for this client). After sending, you can schedule an automatic due reminder there too.
invoice.detail.sendConfirm: Once you send this invoice, there is no going back. The invoice will be marked as sent and cannot be edited. The invoice is final as is.
invoice.detail.failedSendEmailConsole: Failed to send email. Check the console and ensure the API server is running.
invoice.detail.serverHtmlError: Server returned a web page instead of JSON. The API may be unreachable. Ensure the api-server is running (e.g. port 8000) and, if needed, set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
invoice.detail.invalidResponse: Invalid response from server. Please try again.
invoice.detail.paymentDesc: Record how much was paid and when. The invoice will be marked as paid.
invoice.detail.paymentSourceHint: Used by your bookkeeping export to map this payment to the right account.
invoice.detail.serverDatabaseError: The server returned a web page instead of data. Make sure your API server is running and supports the payment endpoint (run "node setup-database.js" once to create the required table, then restart the server).
invoice.detail.failedRecordPaymentNet: Failed to record payment. Check your connection and that the API server is running.
settings.invoiceOptions.payment.fillToAc: Fill account holder and IBAN to activate.
Fill account holder and IBAN before activating.
